name: Farmers Fleet
statement: An event-driven logistics system deployed via Infrastructure as Code (IaC) on Google Kubernetes Engine. With three-portal ecosystem designed to connect farmers and fleet. Developed with a deploy script to provision Terraform, seed the database, and deploy to GKE clusters.

name: Store Locator with Discovery
statement: A cloud-native store locator with discovery features showing five nearest stores on the map from the user's starting point. Integrated Google Maps Platform APIs, and deployed via Docker, gcloud CLI, and Terraform modules.

name: SQL Data Warehouse Project
statement: A personal deep dive into SQL and Data Warehousing, implementing the Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold). I was curious to learn how businesses transforms raw data into structured system for business insights and analytics.

name: Sand and Gravel Ops
statement: A streamlined API for sand and gravel operations, designed to manage orders, track inventory, and monitor status. Integrated PostgreSQL container on local Docker, managed database and server through PostgreSQL extension. A personal capstone following Learn to Cloud curriculum.

name: Portfolio Website
statement: A compilation of cloud projects showcasing skills and resilience as a self-taught learner. Utilized Github Actions for CI/CD, deploying the application on Cloud Run with assets stored in Cloud Storage.
